description:
[[File: A3 diag exportTerrainSVG Example.jpg|thumb|400px|Highly detailed map of [[Stratis]]|right]]
Like the old [[Arma 3: Cheats#TOPOGRAPHY|TOPOGRAPHY]] cheat code, exports terrain, but in modern SVG format instead of the proprietary EMF format.
examples: <sqf>diag_exportTerrainSVG ["C:\Users\USERNAME\Desktop\Stratis_Map.svg", true, true, true, true, true, false]; // replace USERNAME with your username!</sqf>
name: diag_exportTerrainSVG

Item.desc: path on disk. File name and extension have to be included
Item.name: filePath

Item.desc: whether or not to draw location names
Item.name: drawLocationNames

Item.desc: whether or not to draw grid
Item.name: drawGrid

Item.desc: whether or not to count lines
Item.name: drawCountlines

Item.desc: whether or not to draw trees
Item.name: drawTreeObjects

Item.desc: whether or not to draw mountain height spots
Item.name: drawMountainHeightpoints

Item.desc: simplify roads. Draw roads as one long polyline instead of separate segments. Uses average road width as overall width
Item.name: simpleRoads
